meaning: vt.接来,取来,带来,售得,引出,吸引,到达,演绎出vi.取物,绕道而行n.取得,拿,诡计,魂
examples: He went to fetch some books.
Could you fetch me my bag?
I had to fetch water from the well.
As Arnold goes to fetch the truck, I take a moment to soak in the scenery.
But some analysts estimate that the two could fetch as little as euro1 billion.
